allow: Bash(node -e "const QRCode = require\('qrcode'\); QRCode.toString\('hello', {type:'svg'}, \(err,svg\)=>{ if\(!err\) console.log\(svg.slice\(0,200\)\) }\)")
Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); const w = si.siWhatsapp; console.log\({title: w.title, slug: w.slug, hex: w.hex, pathLen: w.path.length}\);")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\)[:500] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\), str\) else ''\) for l in lines[-20:] if l]")
